rulings.Case Title: MASAZUMI INOUE VS. PREFERRED MORTGAGE SERVICES et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 13, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing required to address whether MERS had a beneficial interest in the note and deed of trust after sale to Morgan Stanley Mortgage Capital Inc. in 2006 or whether MERS could be a nominee for a non-member of MERS. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DON DE FRAGA VS. EVA VALDENBENITO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday September 13, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT EVA VALDEBENITO MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. After requesting an affirmative relief from the Court by filing a request for an order shortening time, Defendant entered into a binding settlement agreement. Defendant reviewed, negotiated, and obtained the requested revisions of the terms of the Settlement Agreement. Defendant represented that she received advice from counsel or could receive such advice. Defendant breached the Settlement Agreement in March 2016 and has been in breach until the Judgment was entered. No grounds exist to rescind the agreement or set aside the judgment based on a breach of settlement agreement. = (501/REQ)
